basic_details.job_title: GSSSB Pharmacist/Compounder Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 184 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Gujarat Gaun Seva Pasandgi Mandal (GSSSB), Gandhinagar
basic_details.department: Directorate of AYUSH, Health & Family Welfare Department, Government of Gujarat
basic_details.short_information: Gujarat Gaun Seva Pasandgi Mandal (GSSSB) has published the Pharmacist/Compounder (Ayurveda) Notification 2026 on 15 May 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 184 Pharmacist/Compounder (Ayurveda) positions under the Directorate of AYUSH, Health & Family Welfare Department, Government of Gujarat. Candidates within the age range of 18 to 40 years (for general women) and holding a B.Pharm (Ayurveda) or D.Pharm (Ayurveda) with 2 years experience are eligible to apply online at ojas.gujarat.gov.in. The application process will be active from 15 May 2026 to 29 May 2026, and candidates can easily

important_dates.examination date: To be announced on GSSSB website
important_dates.admit_card_date: To be announced on GSSSB website

application_fee.details: Application fee must be paid online through available payment modes (Debit Card, Internet Banking, UPI, or Wallet). The application fee is refundable to candidates who appear for the examination. | Important Notes: | Fee payment last date: 01-06-2026 (11:59 PM) Online payment only through Debit Card, Internet Banking, UPI, or Wallet Application fee is refundable to candidates who appear for the examination

age_limit.details: Age limit is calculated as on 29-05-2026 (last date of application). Age relaxation is available for women, reserved categories, PwD, and Ex-servicemen as per Government of Gujarat rules.

qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill all eligibility conditions including educational qualification, computer knowledge, and language proficiency. The educational qualification must be from a recognized University/Institution. Basic computer knowledge and adequate knowledge of Gujarati or Hindi language is mandatory. | Educational Qualification (Either of the following): | Additional Mandatory Requirements: | Basic Computer Knowledge: Candidates must possess basic knowledge of computer operations Language Proficiency: Adequate knowledge of Gujarati or Hindi language is mandatory

salary_details.pay_scale: First 5 years: Rs. 40,800/- per month (Fixed) | After 5 years: Rs. 29,200 - 92,300 (Level-5, 7th CPC)
salary_details.after 5 years (if service is satisfactor: Regular appointment on 7th Pay Commission Scale: Rs. 29,200 - 92,300 (Level-5)
salary_details.details: Selected candidates will be appointed as Pharmacist/Compounder (Ayurveda), Class-3 with a fixed pay for the first 5 years. After successful completion of 5 years of satisfactory service, candidates will be given regular appointment on 7th Pay Commission scale. | Note: Regular appointment after 5 years is subject to satisfactory performance during the initial period.

selection_process: The selection process for GSSSB Pharmacist/Compounder (Ayurveda) Recruitment 2026 consists of a single-stage MCQ Examination (CBRT/OMR based) followed by Document Verification. The examination will have 210 questions for 210 marks with 3 hours duration. There is negative marking of 1/4 mark for each wrong answer.

Duration: 3 Hours Negative Marking: 1/4 mark deducted per wrong answer Minimum Qualifying Standard: 40% in both Part A and Part B separately Part A questions: In Gujarati & English both languages Part B questions: In Gujarati & English both languages
Part B - Ayurveda Technical Subject (120 Questions
Widow candidates can get 5% bonus marks on exam score (subject to conditions) Sports quota candidates can get 5% bonus marks on exam score (subject to conditions)
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online only through the OJAS portal (https://ojas.gujarat.gov.in/). No other mode of application will be accepted. The online portal is active from 15-05-2026 (2:00 PM) to 29-05-2026 (11:59 PM). Fee payment can be done till 01-06-2026 (11:59 PM).
Step 1: Visit OJAS Portal - Go to https://ojas.gujarat.gov.in/
Step 2: Register - Register yourself with required details (if not already registered) to create login credentials
Step 3: Login - Login using registered credentials

Step 4: Fill Application Form - Fill the online application form carefully with all required details: Personal information Educational qualifications Experience details (if applicable) Computer knowledge details Language proficiency details Category details
Step 5: Upload Documents - Upload scanned copies of required documents as per specifications
Step 6: Pay Application Fee - Pay application fee online through Debit Card, Internet Banking, UPI, or Wallet (last date: 01-06-2026, 11:59 PM)
Step 7: Submit Application - Review all details carefully and submit the application
Step 8: Take Printout - Take printout of submitted application for future reference
Experience certificate (if claiming relaxation under Option 2)
Any other relevant documents mentioned in the notification
important_instructions: Only online applications accepted through OJAS portal (https://ojas.gujarat.gov.in/) Application start date: 15-05-2026 (2:00 PM) Last date for application: 29-05-2026 (11:59 PM) Last date for fee payment: 01-06-2026 (11:59 PM) Age calculated as on 29-05-2026 Educational Qualification: B.Pharm (Ayurveda) OR D.Pharm (Ayurveda) + 2 years experience Basic computer knowledge mandatory Adequate knowledge of Gujarati or Hindi language mandatory Application fee: General - Rs. 500/-, Reserved/Women/PwD/Ex-Servicemen - Rs. 400/- Application fee is refundable to candidates who appear for the examination Fee payment through Debit Card, Internet Banking, UPI, or Wallet only Examination: Single-stage MCQ (210 questions, 210 marks, 3 hours) Negative marking: 1/4 mark deducted per wrong answer Minimum qualifying: 40% in both Part A and Part B separately Part A questions in Gujarati & English; Part B questions in Gujarati & English Candidates must carry all original certificates at time of verification Widow candidates and sports quota candidates can get 5% bonus marks (subject to conditions) Applications with incorrect details will be rejected at any stage Gujarat Public Examination (Prevention of Unfair Means) Act, 2023 applies - malpractice leads to legal action Salary: First 5 years - Rs. 40,800/- fixed; After 5 years - Rs. 29,200-92,300 (Level-5, 7th CPC) PwD vacancies covered under separate notification (No. 401/202526) For queries: Call GSSSB office at 079-23258916 Candidates are advised to visit official website regularly for exam date, admit card, and result updates

faq.question: Q1. What is GSSSB Pharmacist/Compounder (Ayurveda) Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: GSSSB Pharmacist/Compounder (Ayurveda) Recruitment 2026 is a state government recruitment drive under Advertisement No. 407/202627 to fill 184 Class‑3 Pharmacist/Compounder (Ayurveda) posts in the Directorate of AYUSH, Health & Family Welfare Department, Government of Gujarat.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are released for GSSSB Pharmacist/Compounder (Ayurveda) 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 184 vacancies have been notified for the Pharmacist/Compounder (Ayurveda), Class‑3 post, distributed among Unreserved, EWS, SEBC, SC and ST categories, with women’s reservation included within each category and separate PwD vacancies covered under Notification No. 401/202526.

faq.question: Q3. What are the important dates for GSSSB Pharmacist/Compounder (Ayurveda) Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Online applications for GSSSB Pharmacist/Compounder (Ayurveda) 2026 will be accepted on the OJAS portal from 15 May 2026 (2:00 PM) to 29 May 2026 (11:59 PM), and the last date for online fee payment is 01 June 2026 (11:59 PM), while the crucial date for age calculation is 29 May 2026.

faq.question: Q4. What is the eligibility and educational qualification for GSSSB Pharmacist/Compounder (Ayurveda) 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must have either a B.Pharm (Ayurveda) degree from a recognized university or a D.Pharm (Ayurveda) with at least 2 years’ experience as Pharmacist/Compounder in a Government, Local Body, Government Undertaking, Board or Corporation, along with basic computer knowledge and adequate knowledge of Gujarati or Hindi.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for GSSSB Pharmacist/Compounder (Ayurveda) Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: For GSSSB Pharmacist/Compounder (Ayurveda) 2026, the general male age limit is 18 to 35 years as on 29 May 2026, with higher upper‑age limits for women, reserved categories, PwD candidates, and Ex‑servicemen as per Government of Gujarat rules.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary for GSSSB Pharmacist/Compounder (Ayurveda) posts?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive a fixed salary of Rs. 40,800 per month for the first 5 years, after which, on satisfactory service, they will be placed in the regular Level‑5 pay scale of Rs. 29,200 – 92,300 under the 7th CPC.

faq.question: Q7. What is the exam pattern for GSSSB Pharmacist/Compounder (Ayurveda) 2026?
faq.answer: The selection is through a single‑stage objective MCQ exam (CBRT/OMR) of 210 questions for 210 marks in 3 hours, divided into Part A (Reasoning, Quantitative Aptitude, Constitution, Current Affairs, Comprehension) for 90 marks and Part B (Ayurveda technical subjects) for 120 marks, with 1/4 negative marking and minimum 40% qualifying marks separately in each part.

faq.question: Q8. Which Ayurveda topics are covered in the technical section (Part B) of the exam?
faq.answer: Part B of the paper includes Ayurveda Parichaya, Swasthavritta, Rachana Sharira, Kriya Sharira, Aushadh Nirman Siddhant, Dravyaguna, Rasashastra, General Introduction of Treatment, Bhaishajya Kalpana, and Pharmacy Management, collectively carrying 120 questions for 120 marks.

faq.question: Q9. What is the application fee for GSSSB Pharmacist/Compounder (Ayurveda) 2026 and is it refundable?
faq.answer: The application fee is Rs. 500 for General candidates and Rs. 400 for Reserved categories, Women, PwD and Ex‑servicemen, and it is payable only online through Debit Card, Net Banking, UPI or Wallet, with the fee refundable to candidates who actually appear in the examination.

faq.question: Q10. How can I apply online for GSSSB Pharmacist/Compounder (Ayurveda) Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must apply online via the OJAS portal at https://ojas.gujarat.gov.in by registering, filling the Pharmacist/Compounder (Ayurveda) application form, uploading required documents, paying the application fee online, and then submitting and printing the final application for future reference.
